title: Skill 06 — visual-identity Output
description: Complete visual brand system calibrated on buyer psychology. Written to phase-1-5/outputs/06-visual-identity.json

color_system.description: 60-30-10 color system derived from dominant_emotion mapping

emotion_rationale.description: Why this color matches the dominant_emotion (e.g. 'Deep midnight signals authority and urgency for fear-driven buyers')

role.description: Functional role in layout (e.g. 'backgrounds, section dividers, card surfaces')

hex.description: 6-digit hex color code — appears ONLY on CTA button(s), nowhere else on page

contrast_ratio.description: WCAG contrast ratio against page background (e.g. '7.2:1') — must be >= 4.5:1

title_font.description: Google Fonts name for headlines and titles (e.g. 'Playfair Display')

body_font.description: Google Fonts name for body copy and subheadings (e.g. 'Inter')

accent_font.description: Optional Google Fonts name for accent/handwriting elements. Null if not used.

price_tier_rationale.description: Why this font pairing matches the price_point and psychographic (e.g. 'Playfair + Inter signals quiet luxury appropriate for $47 premium tier')

ebook_body_size_px.description: Body font size in pixels for ebook/PDF (16-18)

ebook_max_line_chars.description: Maximum characters per line for ebook body (50-75)

social_title_size_px.description: Minimum title font size in pixels at 1080px canvas width (min 80)

safe_zone_top_px.description: Text-free zone from top edge in pixels

safe_zone_bottom_px.description: Text-free zone from bottom edge in pixels

text_style.description: Visual text treatment for TikTok overlays (e.g. 'Bold white sans-serif, black drop shadow, kinetic shake animation')

margins_px.description: Safe margin on all sides in pixels

palette_note.description: Platform-specific color guidance (e.g. 'High contrast dominant_60 background, champagne title text, CTA accent on button strip at bottom')

emotional_journey.description: Color and typography behavior across the 4 funnel stages

color_shift.description: How dominant color is modified at awareness stage (e.g. 'dominant_60 at +18% saturation for dopamine activation')
Color transition at consideration stage (e.g. 'Shift to elevated neutrals — secondary_30 dominates layout')

typography_note.description: Typography treatment at consideration stage (e.g. '16px body, 1.5x line-height, max 65 chars/line')

cta_color.description: CTA accent hex — isolated occurrence only (e.g. '#EC5800')

urgency_technique.description: Scarcity/urgency visual technique deployed at this stage (e.g. 'countdown timer in cta_accent_10 color, risk-reversal badge adjacent to button')

color_shift.description: Color palette used in confirmation/upsell screens (e.g. 'Switch to deep navy #1F3A68 + calming green #2E7D32')

rationale.description: Why this shift serves buyer psychology (e.g. 'Parasympathetic colors reduce post-purchase anxiety before presenting upsell')

hero_mockup_spec.description: Full spec for the hero product image (e.g. '3D ebook mockup, 300 DPI, 15-degree perspective, hard drop shadow, surrounded by laptop + mobile device frames with real content visible')

proof_wall_type.description: Social proof visual treatment (e.g. 'Floor-to-ceiling raw DM screenshots, slight rotation variation, no cropping of usernames, raw > polished')

risk_reversal_badge.description: Guarantee badge placement and design (e.g. '30-day money-back shield badge, placed directly adjacent to CTA button, not below the fold')

texture_overlay.description: Texture type and blending mode (e.g. 'Linen paper texture in Multiply blending mode at 8% opacity on hero section')

handwriting_accent.description: Script font name + usage rule (e.g. 'Caveat — used as PNG image overlay, not editable text — arrow pointing to CTA with label Start here!')

canva_midjourney_prompts.description: Ready-to-paste generation prompts for all 4 platforms

ebook_cover.description: Full Canva/Midjourney prompt for ebook cover — includes color hex, mood, style, and dimensions

tiktok_visual.description: Full prompt for TikTok background visual — respects safe zones, kinetic feel

instagram_post.description: Full prompt for Instagram 1:1 post — includes 80px margins guidance, palette

pinterest_pin.description: Full prompt for Pinterest 2:3 pin — high contrast, title-first hierarchy

competitors_audited.description: Names of competitors whose visual identity was audited

dominant_pattern_in_niche.description: The visual pattern all/most competitors share (e.g. 'All use navy + orange CTA on white background with serif title fonts')

our_disruptor_color.description: Hex code of the single color that breaks the dominant pattern

differentiation_axis.description: Which visual axis is used to differentiate (color = different dominant/CTA, typography = different font family, style = dark vs light / minimal vs loud)

ab_test_priority.description: Ordered list of A/B test recommendations — highest impact first

element.description: Page/asset element being tested (e.g. 'CTA button color')
